name: Lucini Bus Co
principals: John Pasquale (Manager listed at Forestdale yard); Lucini family ownership
employees_est: 100+ fleetwide (Forestdale yard is a satellite; 4-employee figure reflects only Sandwich/Forestdale satellite, not enterprise)
districts_or_customers: Sandwich Public Schools (Forestdale School K-2 and other Sandwich schools); broader school and charter customers across SE Massachusetts
recent_news: Long-tenured family business operating ~65+ years; no public M&A activity identified as of 2026; markets itself as the school bus contractor for Sandwich Public Schools.
fit_notes: Strong potential tuck-in: family-owned MA school bus operator with ~80 vehicles, school contracts (Sandwich), in-Summit state. The Forestdale, MA address is the Sandwich satellite yard of Bridgewater-HQ'd Lucini Bus Lines/Lucini Transportation; database 'single/4 employees' tag understates true size. Succession potential after 65+ years of family ownership.

name: Directions Plus
service_types: senior transportation / non-emergency medical transport (NEMT); not a school bus operator
districts_or_customers: Cleveland-area senior/disability clients (Cuyahoga County); no school district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or notable news identified; small Ohio LLC active since 2002 categorized as senior citizen services / NEMT.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Three-person NEMT/senior-services micro-operator with no school bus contracts and no fleet of yellow buses. Out of scope for Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis.
